positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    palace_of_flies != harry_potter).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    published_by(palace_of_flies,new_vessel_press)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    neapolitan_chronicles != palace_of_flies).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    neapolitan_chronicles != harry_potter).

cnf(u16,negated_conjecture,
    ~published_by(harry_potter,new_vessel_press)).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    published_by(neapolitan_chronicles,new_vessel_press)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define in_english(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define translated_from(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u15,axiom,
    neapolitan_chronicles != harry_potter).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    palace_of_flies != harry_potter).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    neapolitan_chronicles != palace_of_flies).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define published_by(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define in_english(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define translated_from(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
